article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.1. Attachment 1 - Anti-Palestinian Racism Naming, Framing and Manifestations 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Anti-Palestinian Racism Framework as Reference Document
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to consider adopting a report by the Arab Canadian Lawyers Association that defines and describes anti-Palestinian racism (APR) — discrimination that silences, excludes, or dehumanizes Palestinians or those who support Palestinian rights — as a reference document for the city's anti-racism work.
briefs.action_required: Review the report before the council meeting if your workplace has equity or anti-racism policies that could be affected.
